---
name: 💡 Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What would you like to be able to do?

Describe the use case and the problem it solves.

## Proposed solution

How you imagine it working (e.g. a new flag, a new output format).

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds you currently use.

## Additional context

Links, examples, or anything else helpful.
